name: AutoComplete
description: AutoComplete is an input component that provides real-time suggestions while being typed.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: Value of the component.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The default value for the input when not controlled by `modelValue`.

props.name: name
props.description: The name attribute for the element, typically used in form submissions.

props.name: suggestions
props.description: An array of suggestions to display.

props.name: optionLabel
props.description: Property name or getter function to use as the label of an option.

props.name: optionDisabled
props.description: Property name or getter function to use as the disabled flag of an option, defaults to false when not defined.

props.name: optionGroupLabel
props.description: Property name or getter function to use as the label of an option group.

props.name: optionGroupChildren
props.description: Property name or getter function that refers to the children options of option group.

props.name: typeahead
props.description: whether typeahead is active or not.

props.name: scrollHeight
props.description: Maximum height of the suggestions overlay.

props.name: dropdown
props.description: Displays a button next to the input field when enabled.

props.name: dropdownMode
props.description: Specifies the behavior dropdown button. Default 'blank' mode sends an empty string and 'current' mode sends the input value.

props.name: multiple
props.description: Specifies if multiple values can be selected.

props.name: showClear
props.description: When enabled, a clear icon is displayed to clear the value.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Default text to display when no option is selected.

props.name: loading
props.description: Whether the autocomplete is in loading state.

props.name: size
props.description: Defines the size of the component.

props.name: invalid
props.description: When present, it specifies that the component should have invalid state style.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When present, it specifies that the component should be disabled.

props.name: variant
props.description: Specifies the input variant of the component.

props.name: dataKey
props.description: A property to uniquely identify an option.

props.name: minLength
props.description: Minimum number of characters to initiate a search.

props.name: delay
props.description: Delay between keystrokes to wait before sending a query.

props.name: appendTo
props.description: A valid query selector or an HTMLElement to specify where the overlay gets attached. Special keywords are 'body' for document body and 'self' for the element itself.

props.name: forceSelection
props.description: When present, autocomplete clears the manual input if it does not match of the suggestions to force only accepting values from the suggestions.

props.name: completeOnFocus
props.description: Whether to run a query when input receives focus.

props.name: inputId
props.description: Identifier of the underlying input element.

props.name: inputStyle
props.description: Inline style of the input field.

props.name: inputClass
props.description: Style class of the input field.

props.name: panelStyle
props.description: Inline style of the overlay.

props.name: panelClass
props.description: Style class of the overlay.

props.name: overlayStyle
props.description: Inline style of the overlay overlay.

props.name: overlayClass
props.description: Style class of the overlay overlay.

props.name: dropdownIcon
props.description: Icon to display in the dropdown.

props.name: dropdownClass
props.description: Style class of the dropdown button.

props.name: loadingIcon
props.description: Icon to display in loading state.

props.name: loader
props.description: Icon to display in loading state.

props.name: removeTokenIcon
props.description: Icon to display in chip remove action.

props.name: chipIcon
props.description: Icon to display in chip remove action.

props.name: virtualScrollerOptions
props.description: Whether to use the virtualScroller feature. The properties of VirtualScroller component can be used like an object in it.

props.name: autoOptionFocus
props.description: Whether to focus on the first visible or selected element when the overlay is shown.

props.name: selectOnFocus
props.description: When enabled, the focused option is selected.

props.name: focusOnHover
props.description: When enabled, the focus is placed on the hovered option.

props.name: searchLocale
props.description: Locale to use in searching. The default locale is the host environment's current locale.

props.name: searchMessage
props.description: Text to be displayed in hidden accessible field when filtering returns any results. Defaults to value from PrimeVue locale configuration.

props.name: selectionMessage
props.description: Text to be displayed in hidden accessible field when options are selected. Defaults to value from PrimeVue locale configuration.

props.name: emptySelectionMessage
props.description: Text to be displayed in hidden accessible field when any option is not selected. Defaults to value from PrimeVue locale configuration.

props.name: emptySearchMessage
props.description: Text to display when filtering does not return any results. Defaults to value from PrimeVue locale configuration.

props.name: showEmptyMessage
props.description: When enabled, empty search message will be visible.

props.name: tabindex
props.description: Index of the element in tabbing order.

props.name: fluid
props.description: Spans 100% width of the container when enabled.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Defines a string value that labels an interactive element.

props.name: ariaLabelledby
props.description: Identifier of the underlying input element.

props.name: formControl
props.description: Form control object, typically used for handling validation and form state.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: value-change
events.description: Emitted when the value changes in uncontrolled mode.

events.name: change
events.description: Callback to invoke on value change.

events.name: focus
events.description: Callback to invoke when the component receives focus.

events.name: blur
events.description: Callback to invoke when the component loses focus.

events.name: item-select
events.description: Callback to invoke when a suggestion is selected.

events.name: item-unselect
events.description: Callback to invoke when a selected value is removed.

events.name: option-select
events.description: Callback to invoke when a suggestion is selected.

events.name: option-unselect
events.description: Callback to invoke when a selected value is removed.

events.name: dropdown-click
events.description: Callback to invoke to when dropdown button is clicked.

events.name: clear
events.description: Callback to invoke when input is cleared by the user.

events.name: complete
events.description: Callback to invoke to search for suggestions.

events.name: before-show
events.description: Callback to invoke before the overlay is shown.

events.name: before-hide
events.description: Callback to invoke before the overlay is hidden.

events.name: show
events.description: Callback to invoke when the overlay is shown.

events.name: hide
events.description: Callback to invoke when the overlay is hidden.

slots.name: chip
slots.type: (scope: { /** * A value in the selection */ value: any; /** * Index of the token. */ index: number; /** * Remove token icon function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ removeCallback: (event: Event) => void; }): VNode[]

slots.name: header
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Value of the component */ value: any; /** * Displayed options */ suggestions: any[]; }): VNode[]

slots.name: footer
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Value of the component */ value: any; /** * Displayed options */ suggestions: any[]; }): VNode[]

slots.name: option
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Option instance */ option: any; /** * Index of the option */ index: number; }): VNode[]

slots.name: optiongroup
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Option instance */ option: any; /** * Index of the option */ index: number; }): VNode[]

slots.name: content
slots.type: (scope: { /** * An array of objects to display for virtualscroller */ items: any; /** * Style class of the component */ styleClass: string; /** * Referance of the content * @param {HTMLElement} el - Element of 'ref' property */ contentRef: (el: any) => void; /** * Options of the items * @param {number} index - Rendered index * @return {VirtualScrollerItemOptions} */ getItemOptions: (index: number) => VirtualScrollerItemOptions; }): VNode[]

slots.name: loader
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Options of the loader items for virtualscroller */ options: any[]; }): VNode[]

slots.name: empty
slots.description: Custom empty template when there is no data to display.

slots.name: dropdownicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]

slots.name: removetokenicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the icon. */ class: string; /** * Index of the token. */ index: number; /** * Remove token icon function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ removeCallback: (event: Event, index: number) => void; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom chip icon template in multiple mode.

slots.name: chipicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the icon. */ class: string; /** * Index of the token. */ index: number; /** * Remove token icon function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ removeCallback: (event: Event, index: number) => void; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom chip icon template in multiple mode.

slots.name: loadingicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the loader. */ class: string; }): VNode[]

slots.name: loader
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the loader. */ class: string; }): VNode[]

slots.name: dropdownbutton
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Toggle function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ toggleCallback: (event: Event) => void; }): VNode[]

slots.name: dropdown
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Toggle function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ toggleCallback: (event: Event) => void; }): VNode[]

slots.name: clearicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Clear icon click function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ clearCallback: (event: Event) => void; }): VNode[]
